annotation_target.structure: Second period antecedent — cantabile theme with slightly varied harmony
teaching_goals: feel the variation in the harmony while maintaining the cantabile quality
the theme is maturing through the movement
style_tips: same pp/mp character as the opening
the variation enriches without changing the mood

teaching_notes.note: The theme returns with subtle variation — familiar but enriched.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 17–20 of Pathetique Sonata, 2nd Movement (Adagio cantabile), view the piano roll, analyze the phrase, play in a loop, and predict the continuation.

session.content: Show me measures 17–20 of Pathetique mvt 2 — the second period begins here. Describe it.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 17–20.

Measures 17–20 begin the movement's second period — a restatement and continuation of the cantabile theme with slightly different harmonic coloring. The singing quality is maintained and the LH arpeggios continue their rocking motion. Let me loop mm. 17–20.
Pathetique mvt 2 mm. 17–20: second period antecedent, cantabile theme continues, slightly varied harmony.
